posts.cooked:
So, another round of correcting. For the texts, Im already at them and will be finished sooner or later. The language is much better than in LBA1. This time Ive got another problem - with the voices.

(Ive translated the quotes to English for your better reference)
On Emerald Moon, at a certain place, Baldino should say (as also in the text):

The doors jammed. We have to find some way to open it.

But instead you only hear:

The doors jammed.

When crash-landing on Otringal, he should say:

Twinsen, I damaged the vessel during landing. I need some time for repairs. The Zeelichian fuel is called gazogem, its very powerful. You should go get some.

But instead it goes like this:

We have to find some way to open it. (pause) Twinsen, I damaged the vessel during landing. I need some time for repairs. The Zeelichian fuel is called gazogem, its very powerful. You should go get some.

I dont know how the quote from Emerald Moon slipped over to Otringal, and I dont know how to fix it. I am a totally noob at sound programs and dont even have proper ones.
The translation guides are not helpfull this time, because I only have 2 (or maybe some more) entries too fix.

There are a few other problems:
After saving Raph, when with Zoe, if you keep walking into the wrong direction, Zoe should say (again this is the right way in the displayed text):

No, not through there. First Lets go over to the lighthouse and visit the Weather Wizard.

But instead she just says:

No, not through there.

When winning the race on Desert Island, the guy should say:

I am going to tell you a little secret: a wizard told me that he might have hidden a protective spell on the island across from the Hacienda.

But instead theres just a

I am going to tell you a little secret:

Ive never heard the other parts of the quotes somewhere, but they may be hidden somewhere in the .vox files at one of the quotes you never hear.

Now, I dont know how to fix this. I am sure one of the guys from the modifications forum can help me. Do you know how to do this?
- be sure youve read my whole post before responding. Thank you -

For the sound specification you must follow this:
Type: ACM Waveform - Microsoft ACM: IMA ADPCM
Audio format: PCM (uncompressed)
Channels: Mono
Sample rate: 22 050 Hz
Bit resolution: 16 bit

If I edit the files, do I have to set the sound specification again before saving?

- Kobold: A torrent is some kind of information of the computer with BitTorrnet software from which the files are. This information is then handled by a BitTorrent client, which uses it to download the files in a torrent.

As for eMule - its P2P (peer-to-peer) file sharing client, just like eDonkey2000 and Shareaza (Shareaza also supports BitTorrent).

And yes, if you edit the files, you have to set the sound specification again before saving.
You can also use Audacity, its freeware, but I dont know if it can save files in specific format.
